violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Salad bar items stored in FOH refrigerator not date marked.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. FOH refrigerator and counters have food debris build up and need cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store cups etc. off floor near chest freezer in BOH storage area.
